chapter_title: Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol
text:
The commissioner may take disciplinary action against any licensee after a hearing as provided in this chapter by any of the following:

(a) Imposing probation upon terms and conditions to be set forth by the commissioner.

(b) Suspending the license.

(c) Revoking the license.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2.5. Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol [2500 - 2574]
#### Article 5. Denial, Suspension and Revocation [2540 - 2549]
##### § 2544

The commissioner may take disciplinary action against any licensee after a hearing as provided in this chapter by any of the following:

(a) Imposing probation upon terms and conditions to be set forth by the commissioner.

(b) Suspending the license.

(c) Revoking the license.

*(Added by Stats. 1968, Ch. 1309.)*

subsections.text: The commissioner may take disciplinary action against any licensee after a hearing as provided in this chapter by any of the following:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Imposing probation upon terms and conditions to be set forth by the commissioner.
